description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior paneling and a bright blue interior basin. The jacuzzi features a metal ladder at the front for easy entry and exit, and a visible filtration system with an orange pump and white filter attached to the side. The water inside appears clean and nearly full, with the surface close to the top edge. The structure is supported by a concrete or stone base, ensuring stability on urban surfaces. No visible jets or control panels are present, but the design suggests a modern, functional outdoor spa suitable for residential or communal urban environments.
description: An octagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with a blue interior, metal ladder, and attached filtration system. The water is nearly full and the structure sits on a solid base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal entry ladder and the octagonal wooden exterior.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the filtration system and pump attached to the jacuzzi, as well as a partial view of the ladder.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the filtration system and pump, with the ladder visible on the far side.
description_view_3: Side view with the filtration system and pump on the left, and the ladder on the right.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water surface close to the top edge
